variants.title: Fleetguard AF26427 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P614547
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26427 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011

variants.title: Donaldson P614547 Air Panel, Ventilation
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P614547 Air Panel, Ventilation is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, ventilation applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
